title: verbascum armenum var. occidentale
intro: Verbascum armenum var. occidentale is a variant of the Verbascum armenum plant, also known as the Armenian mullein, which is a biennial herb belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain saponins and flavonoids with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum armenum var. occidentale include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for coughs, colds, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used to calm irritated skin, reduce fever, and promote wound healing.
